data.title: Can-Fite BioPharma granted Brazilian patent for sexual dysfunction treatment using A3 adenosine receptor agonist.
data.description: Can-Fite BioPharma Ltd., a biotech firm, has received Patent No. BR112015002697-4 from the Brazilian Patent Office. This patent focuses on the use of an A3 Adenosine Receptor Agonist for treating Sexual Dysfunction. The company, listed on NYSE American as CANF and TASE as CANF, specializes in developing small-molecule drugs for oncological and inflammatory conditions. The announcement was made from Ramat Gan, Israel on December 26, 2025.

data.title: Crayola partners with McDonald's for global Happy Meal experience in 60+ countries, sparking kids' creativity worldwide.
data.description: In over 60 countries worldwide, a dynamic partnership has ignited children's creativity, turning ordinary family activities into fantastical adventures. Recently on December 26, 2025, Crayola and McDonald's joined forces for the inaugural global collaboration, introducing a fresh Happy Meal experience for kids. This unique venture is poised to revamp the way kids engage with their surroundings and spark imaginative pursuits.

ISRAELI DEFENSE MINISTER KATZ DIRECTS THE ISRAELI ARMY TO “ACT FORCEFULLY AND IMMEDIATELY” AGAINST THE VILLAGE OF “QABATIYA” FROM WHICH THE PERPETRATOR OF THE “AFULA” OPERATION EMERGED NORTH OF ISRAEL.

data.title: Over the past year, memecoins have plunged by 65%, indicating waning interest and liquidity in the market.
data.description: Memecoins, which were once a measure of retail excitement in the market, are now ending the year with reduced liquidity, lower levels of participation, and diminishing speculative momentum.

data.description: TechCreate Group (ticker: TCGL) is expected to release its earnings report before the market opens today. The company's performance will be closely observed by investors. For more detailed information, please refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones and S&P 500 reach record highs before Christmas holiday, Palantir, Tesla, Google and Nvidia in buy zones.
data.description: The Dow Jones achieved a record high closing, while the S&P 500 reached a peak during the Christmas holiday period. Companies such as Palantir, Tesla, Google, and Nvidia are currently within recommended buying zones. After the holiday, Dow Jones Futures experienced a decline despite the overall stock market reaching new highs.

data.title: MenuSifu partners with MIXUE for U.S. expansion, as MIXUE becomes world's largest beverage chain by store count.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, MenuSifu, a prominent restaurant technology provider catering to Asian restaurants in the U.S., revealed its continued collaboration with MIXUE. This partnership comes at a significant juncture for MIXUE, as the beverage brand attains a momentous achievement by emerging as the biggest beverage chain globally.

data.title: 2025: Crypto industry transformed by hacks, shocks, regulation, and upgrades, influencing mainstream adoption.
data.description: The year 2025 brought significant changes to the crypto industry, impacting its operations and the understanding of mainstream adoption. These changes included an increase in hacks and macro shocks, as well as the implementation of stablecoin regulations and upgrades to market structures. These alterations have reshaped the industry, emphasizing the importance of understanding how crypto operates and what mainstream adoption entails.

data.title: TechCreate Group Ltd. (NYSE American: TCGL) announces fiscal year 2025 H1 results, highlighting new projects in Singapore and Brunei.
data.description: TechCreate Group Ltd. (NYSE American: TCGL), a technology consultancy and software solutions provider focusing on payment solutions, cybersecurity, and digital services, revealed its financial and operational performance for the six months ending June 30, 2025. Key highlights include securing a new Real-Time Engine Project in Singapore and enhancing the Real-Time Engine for a current client in Brunei.
